investigation_summary: Distinctive documented choice after Rana Plaza: refused legally binding Bangladesh Accord; operated proprietary weaker program while peers signed enforceable pact. Good On You 3/5. Gender pay cases. COVID warehouse safety class action 2020.

profile.tax_summary: ~26% effective (2023 commentary). >$110M Good Jobs First subsidy tally.
profile.legal_summary: Post-Rana Plaza: Gap declined Bangladesh Accord; maintained Gap-led alternative — documented in Guardian contemporaneous coverage. 2020 warehouse COVID safety class action. Repeated corporate gender-pay litigation.
profile.labor_summary: Bangladesh supplier network overlap with tragedy ecosystem though not in collapsed building. Partial supplier disclosure; audits show violations. Athleta FLA certification contrast.
profile.environmental_summary: Denim water — Water<Less program reduces intensity. Virgin polyester microplastics. CDP B-.
profile.product_health: Typical apparel chemistry profile; no blockbuster recall emphasized here.
profile.executive_summary: Governance stable absent criminal findings in set.
